criteria_verification.criterion_text: `internal_docs.always_include` paths are prepended to the flag list
criteria_verification.evidence: always_include paths are read from origin manifest and prepended to `paths`/`flags` before any category-filtered docs. criteria_verification.criterion_text: Dependency chase follows manifests up to depth 2 then stops with
criteria_verification.evidence: BFS over manifests with `_DEPTH_CAP = 2`. At depth+1 > _DEPTH_CAP a warning with code `context_manifest_cycle_detected` and `details.reason='depth_cap'` is emitted. Verified by TestDepthCapChase (3 tests: depth-1 chase, depth-2 chase, depth-3 stop with warning).
criteria_verification.notes: BFS over manifests with `_DEPTH_CAP = 2`. At depth+1 > _DEPTH_CAP a warning with code `context_manifest_cycle_detected` and `details.reason='depth_cap'` is emitted. Verified by TestDepthCapChase (3 tests: depth-1 chase, depth-2 chase, depth-3 stop with warning).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Cycle detection: a manifest already visited in the current chain is not
criteria_verification.evidence: Per-chain visited set (frozenset) carried with each BFS frame. Verified by TestCycleDetection::test_two_node_cycle_resolves_safely.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Documents whose resolved absolute path is outside `read_allowlist` are
criteria_verification.evidence: `_validate_doc_path()` checks `_is_within(resolved, allowed)` for each entry of read_allowlist. If none match, the doc is omitted and a `context_manifest_path_outside_allowlist` warning is emitted with `details.path` set to the omitted absolute path. Verified by TestReadAllowlistExclusion::test_doc_outside_allowlist_is_omitted_and_warned.
criteria_verification.notes: `_validate_doc_path()` checks `_is_within(resolved, allowed)` for each entry of read_allowlist. Verified by TestReadAllowlistExclusion::test_doc_outside_allowlist_is_omitted_and_warned.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Documents whose path resolves outside the repo root are omitted with a
criteria_verification.evidence: `_validate_doc_path()` first checks `_is_within(resolved, owning_repo_root)`. If the resolved path escapes the repo root (e.g. via `..`), a `context_manifest_path_outside_repo` warning is emitted and the doc is omitted. Verified by TestDocPathEscapesRepoRoot::test_path_with_dotdot_escape_is_rejected.
criteria_verification.notes: `_validate_doc_path()` first checks `_is_within(resolved, owning_repo_root)`. If the resolved path escapes the repo root (e.g. via `..`), a `context_manifest_path_outside_repo` warning is emitted and the doc is omitted. Verified by TestDocPathEscapesRepoRoot::test_path_with_dotdot_escape_is_rejected.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Resolution is **stateless** — two concurrent calls against the same
criteria_verification.evidence: No module-level cache (no `@functools.cache`, no module-level mutable state). Each call constructs fresh lists for `flags`, `paths`, `warnings`. Verified by TestStatelessness::test_two_calls_return_independent_lists which mutates the first result and asserts the second is unaffected.
criteria_verification.notes: No module-level cache (no `@functools.cache`, no module-level mutable state). Each call constructs fresh lists for `flags`, `paths`, `warnings`. Verified by TestStatelessness::test_two_calls_return_independent_lists which mutates the first result and asserts the second is unaffected.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Order is stable: `always_include` first, then categories in
criteria_verification.evidence: always_include paths prepended; then docs bucketed per-category and emitted in canonical `_CATEGORY_ORDER` (architecture, decisions, specs, contracts, source — first-appearance order in DDR-005 dict values). Within each category bucket, docs are appended in BFS+declaration order. Verified by TestStableOrder::test_always_include_then_categories_then_declaration_order with mixed-category fixtures.
criteria_verification.notes: always_include paths prepended; then docs bucketed per-category and emitted in canonical `_CATEGORY_ORDER` (architecture, decisions, specs, contracts, source — first-appearance order in DDR-005 dict values). Within each category bucket, docs are appended in BFS+declaration order. Verified by TestStableOrder::test_always_include_then_categories_then_declaration_order with mixed-category fixtures.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Symlinks are followed before allowlist check
criteria_verification.evidence: `_validate_doc_path()` calls `candidate.resolve(strict=False)` before either the repo-root or allowlist checks. `resolve()` follows symlinks, so a symlink pointing outside the repo or allowlist is correctly rejected. Verified by TestSymlinksFollowedBeforeAllowlistCheck::test_symlink_target_outside_allowlist_is_rejected (skipped on Windows).
